fields.name: Beef Tehari

fields.description: Slow cooked beef kala bhuna with caramelized onions and rich spices.

fields.description: Old Dhaka famous beef biryani cooked with fragrant rice and spices.

fields.name: Chicken Roast
fields.description: Traditional Bangladeshi chicken roast cooked in rich gravy.

fields.description: Juicy grilled beef burger with cheddar cheese and caramelized onion.

fields.name: Crispy Chicken Burger
fields.description: Crunchy fried chicken burger with lettuce and creamy mayo.

fields.name: Sushi Platter
fields.description: Fresh sushi platter with salmon, tuna and avocado rolls.

fields.name: Chicken Teriyaki
